events.text: Own Goal by Mario Mandzukic, Croatia.  France 1, Croatia 0.
N'Golo Kanté (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  France 1, Croatia 1. Ivan Perisic (Croatia) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Domagoj Vida   following a set piece situation.
Goal!  France 2, Croatia 1. Antoine Griezmann (France) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Lucas Hernández (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  France 3, Croatia 1. Paul Pogba (France) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  France 4, Croatia 1. Kylian Mbappé (France) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Lucas Hernández.
Goal!  France 4, Croatia 2. Mario Mandzukic (Croatia) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Sime Vrsaljko (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
